moonPhaseCycle.label: Waxing Crescent
moonPhaseCycle.description: Thin sunlit crescent growing after new moon

moonPhaseCycle.label: First Quarter
moonPhaseCycle.description: Half disc lit on the right (northern hemisphere)

moonPhaseCycle.label: Waxing Gibbous
moonPhaseCycle.description: More than half lit, still growing toward full

moonPhaseCycle.label: Waning Gibbous
moonPhaseCycle.description: More than half lit on the opposite side, shrinking after full

moonPhaseCycle.label: Third Quarter
moonPhaseCycle.description: Half disc lit on the left (northern hemisphere)

moonPhaseCycle.label: Waning Crescent
moonPhaseCycle.description: Thin crescent before new moon (opposite limb from waxing crescent)
